Evaluator.description:
A person who evaluates a thesis (supervisor or opponent).

``v0`` — loose. ``id`` and ``role`` are optional because raw sources may not
expose a stable identifier, and an ``Evaluator`` may be referenced outside the
context of a single role (e.g. in aggregated stats).

name.description: Full display name of the evaluator.
name.title: Name

id.description: Stable identifier for the evaluator, if known. Scheme TBD.
id.title: Id

image_url.description: Profile image reference (site-relative path or absolute URL), if any.
image_url.title: Image Url

role.description: Role for the referencing thesis, if applicable.

Evaluator.title: Evaluator

EvaluatorRole.description: Role an evaluator plays for a given thesis.
EvaluatorRole.title: EvaluatorRole

description:
Per-evaluator aggregated grade statistics — the artifact the web app serves.

``v0`` — grade distribution (counts) and probabilities (normalised) are keyed by
the string form of the grade so the JSON is self-describing and the grade type
can change without reshaping the contract.

total_theses.description: Total number of theses this evaluator evaluated in the dataset.
total_theses.title: Total Theses

grade_distribution.description: Count of theses per grade, keyed by grade as a string.
grade_distribution.title: Grade Distribution

grade_probabilities.description: Probability of each grade (counts normalised to ~1.0).
grade_probabilities.title: Grade Probabilities

by_role.description: Optional grade distribution broken down by evaluator role.
by_role.title: By Role

by_level.description: Optional grade distribution broken down by thesis level.
by_level.title: By Level

last_updated.description: Date these aggregates were last recomputed.
last_updated.title: Last Updated

title: EvaluatorStats
